Longtime Austin civic figure and philanthropist who runs MDW Interests, a private oil, gas and real estate investment firm registered in Austin. Co-founder and president of the Waller Creek Conservancy (now Waterloo Greenway), former facilities chair at St. Edward's University, and instrumental in the merger creating The Contemporary Austin. Despite the 'Unemployed / None' occupation on the filing, her business identity is documented in public press releases. Her 213 federal contributions with a near-uniform Democratic lean are consistent with the civic-donor profile; no ideological PAC tie (pro-Israel, pro-Palestine, gun, or defense) was found in public records.

organizations.role: law firm (real estate / affordable housing / public finance; has a government relations practice)
organizations.notes: Name matches the well-known Texas law firm Coats Rose, P.C., headquartered at 9 Greenway Plaza, Houston (the record's Houston, TX location corroborates; zip 42108 appears to be bad data). A P.C. entity, not a person; classified by the firm's business as a law firm.

Jamil Alam is Managing Principal at Endeavor Real Estate Group, in commercial real estate since 1988, leading high-rise mixed-use urban infill development (The Bowie, IBC Bank Plaza, 91-93 Red River). Sits on Endeavor's Investment/Fundraising/Compensation committees. Home zip 78746 matches his listed Rollingwood civic role.

organizations.org: Real Estate Council of Austin (RECA); Urban Land Institute
organizations.notes: Principal at Endeavor Real Estate Group (Austin), leads downtown high-rise/mixed-use development ($1.6B+ transactions). FEC individual-contribution records confirm 'PALMER, GEOFFREY / ENDEAVOR REAL ESTATE GROUP / Real Estate/Principal' in Austin TX. FEC shows zip 78701 vs. donor-list 78734 (Lakeway) but name+employer+occupation match the same person. No TX lobbyist registration found.

Anne Swift is a Principal at Endeavor Real Estate Group in Austin, leading office and industrial project leasing; her firm bio (read in full) credits her with leasing at The Grove and The Domain, repositioning Frost Bank Tower and 300 West 6th, and transactions with Google, Meta and Deloitte, and lists a BS in Finance from UT-Austin's McCombs School. She is the only Anne Swift in Austin with a substantial public professional footprint (the other local match is a clinical social worker on Clubway Ln). Identity is medium rather than high confidence because the donor record's home zip 78731 (Northwest Hills) could not be independently tied to her — Endeavor's address is 500 W 5th St, 78701 — and the county filing carries no occupation or employer field to corroborate. Endeavor is a major Central Texas developer with active business before the Travis County Commissioners Court (the Dog's Head development financing reviewed by Commissioner Travillion), which makes the giving pattern consistent but is not itself proof of identity.

Dan (Daniel) Frey is a Principal at Endeavor Real Estate Group in Austin (16 yrs), sourcing retail acquisition/development and doing tenant rep; TCU BBA. Matches donor occupation 'CRE' and employer 'ERG/Endeavor'. No FEC PAC contributions and not a registered TX lobbyist.
